title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 1–4, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. The scale of Arlong’s rule becomes clearer as the fish-men dominate the island and its people.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This is...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami's home!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's right... she and I are orphans.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: We were adopted and raised in this house.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: The one who raised us has long been dead now but...

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: The 3 of us used to live here happily in Cocoyashi Village.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: This village...?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong Pirates
dialogue.text: Then why did she join the Arlong pirates who now rule over this very same village?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Did she betray her own hometown!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Well, something like that.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: A real witch, right?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: So? What's your business with that witch,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: CPT. USOPP?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well, after what you just said, I've got more important things to think about.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So then... she's been deceiving us all Arlong... she must've only been aiming for the treasure right from the beginning!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: When I think that...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It pisses me off so damn much! That girl!!!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: Even though she helped protect my village...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: and laughed so happily when sailing together with us...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Inside her mind, she was always planning on how to steal our money and ditch us...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Laughing Happily...?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: her?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why that evil witch!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A person like her deserves an attack of the spiritual order! I'll completely ignore her from now on!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong Pirates
dialogue.text: I told you already, don't start any trouble with the Arlong pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Well, as long as I can get back my ship, it's all fine.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And since I've found the ship already, I guess I should hurry up and leave.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Well, that would be the wise thing to do.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong Pirates
dialogue.text: Mess with the Arlong pirates and it won't end with mere injuries.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: By the way,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Is that the ship you were talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The going merry!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What is it doing over there...!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Wait a minute, that means...

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: Gosa Village

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Alright, I've grasped the basic geography of this area.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Current location

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Going Merry

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: Cocoyashi Village

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong Park

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: I do remember there being a village to the west of here. That must be the cocoyashi village center...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's where I saw those fishermen.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: What's wrong?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I forgot that one of my crewmates,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Got himself uniform- Unately caught by the Fishmen...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And he was already on the verge of death...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I just hope he didn't provoke them and get himself killed...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I told you already, I came here looking for a single woman!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: You half-fish mutant!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
